game.title: Exort
game.short_text: Survive in the spaces between

details.title: Exort
details.description:
Zero or OneFalse or TrueSurvive in the spaces between
Photosensitivity WarningIncludes moving repeating patterns.
Fly your ship through complex and beautiful patterns. Invert your ship to match the color under you.
EXORT is a challenging 1-bit bullet-hell game, but all of the hazards are drawn with the XOR operator. Where two hazards overlap, they disappear.
Play in your browser for free. Made in one week for the 1-BIT JAM 2023: LIGHT & DARK.
CONTROLS
Arrow keys or WASD to MOVEShift to MOVE QUICKLYSpace to INVERTN to SKIP WAVEEscape to END GAME
Only the center pixel of the ship can take damage. Health regenerates over time automatically.
You have infinite lives and can skip any waves that are too challenging. Skip fewer waves for better scores.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.7 out of 5 stars(3 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: ELAiNE
moreInfo.Tags: 1-bit, 2D, Bullet Hell, Pixel Art

game.title: MonoSpin
game.short_text: Spin & Smash your way through 6 themed levels. Just make sure to turn the lights off, or they will see you...

details.title: MonoSpin
details.description:
In this game you play as a character who doesn't run around like normal, but rather spins around and deflects off of walls. Spin and smash your way through 6 different levels, but make sure to turn off the lights - otherwise, they will get aggressive...

Play how you want
You can keep the lights off, and avoid the enemies, going at your own pace, or you can leave them all on and risk getting bombarded - for the achievement.
Controls:
A / D or LEFT / RIGHT - Walk
SPACE or Z - Jump
SHIFT - Spin
DOWN or S - Ground Punch
See the in-game how-to-play page for more information.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Made with Godot v4.1
Wow this is the first actual game I have released for the public to play
Originally, more levels were planned for this game, but I ran out of time. I might add them if I make a future edition of this game.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
If you would like to listen to the soundtrack on its own, I have uploaded a video to my YouTube channel with all of the songs from the game.
MonoSpin - Full Soundtrack

moreInfo.Author: AscendedProduce
moreInfo.Tags: 1-bit, 2D, Godot

resultData.title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind

game.title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
game.short_text: What you can't see isn't real

details.title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
details.description:
Out of Sight, Out of Mind is a puzzle platformer in which anything you can't see, doesn't exist. You must make your way through tricky puzzles and challenging movement sections. Good luck!
A/D - move left/rightS - drop/throw light pickupR - restart the level
Out of sight, out of mind was originally created in a week for the 1-BIT GAME JAM, the theme of which was LIGHT & DARK. In the following weeks, the game was developed further into this demo.
The game can be played in browser, though downloading it is recommended.We are open sourced. Leave a star on our GitHub repo! https://github.com/tymowskyy/out-of-sight-out-of-mindJoin our community on Discord! https://discord.gg/xP7Ux264Check our game's speedrun leaderboard out at https://www.speedrun.com/en-US/Out_of_Sight_Out_of_MindDownload the zip file and unzip it. Run "Out of sight, out of mind.exe"

game.short_text: It's lamps vs vamps in this block-pushing puzzler

details.title: Prince of Darkness Jr.
details.description:
A box-pushing puzzle game where you need to stay out of the light.
Moving vans have turned up at Castle Darkness, and lights have been put up everywhere -- bad news for the young Prince who lives there!
Use the crates and cardboard boxes to block out the light and navigate around the castle.
Created as part of the 1Bit Game Jam 2023. There are only two colours on screen at any time!Highly recommended to play the download version.

game.title: In Dark Is Light
game.short_text: In Light Is Heavy

details.title: In Dark Is Light
details.description:
"In Dark Is Light" was created during the "1 Bit Jam" of 2023, the theme was LIGHT & DARK.
CONCEPT: We wanted to interpret the theme in way was a bit more interesting, so we played whith the double meaning of the word "Light"; things in the dark are light and gravityless, while things in light are heavy and suffer the effect of gravity.
GAMEPLAY: "In Dark Is Light" is a simple 1 Bit platformer, make your way in an handfull of levels, distorting reality with your light and fighting the darklings.
CREDITS: Sponcio (Davide Sponcichetti) & FioreBuddha (Riccardo Fiore),

game.title: ​Blip & Blop
game.short_text: Light and Shadow Allergy Puzzle Platformer

details.title: ​Blip & Blop
details.description:
Blip and Blop's Random Teleporter has sent them a long way from home. Help them get back safely by using the portals on each level. Just remember that Blip has recently been diagnosed with Shadow Allergy and must therefore be in the light at all times or she will start to glitch. Blop on the other hand, has Light Allergy, and just can't stand light rays. Good thing he loves the shadows!
Use WASD/Arrowkeys to navigate the main menu.
In game controls:
A - LeftD - Right W or Space - Jump  R - Restart levelS - Control BlipS - Control Blop

game.title: Dimwood
game.short_text: A roguelike deckbuilder where you venture into the Dimwood. Now on Steam!

details.title: Dimwood
details.description:
Now available on Steam! Wishlist it now!
This page features the original game jam version of Dimwood, with all it's quirks and rough edges. Look out for the Demo, and play the full release when it comes out on Steam! 
A minimalist roguelike deck builder where the light level changes the effects of your cards, and you can upgrade and build on the cards you find. Made in a week for 1-bit jam, with the theme "Light and dark."
Featuring:
Over 100 cards, made with combinations of 16 different modular effects!17 unique enemies and an intimidating boss!A dozen unique game altering artifacts do discover!12 interesting events to explore!Jennifer!

game.title: Dogot
game.short_text: Find your way through this black and white 2D platformer.

details.title: Dogot
details.description:
It's a prototype game made for the itch.io 1-bit jam.
In this 2D platformer you have to reveal hidden element with light in ordrer to progress and to defend yourself. 
To finish a level you only have to reach the exit.
Move with W/A/S/D, jump with SPACE and pause with ESCAPE.
Move the light with the mouse and enable/disable it with MOUSE_RIGHT.
You probably should play it in full screen mode.
This game use Kenney 1-bit asset platformer.
Musics are from Heatle Bros ("Alien impostor") and Fesliyan studio.

game.title: ShadowLight Siblings
game.short_text: A 1 bit game for a 1 bit GameJam with a theme of "Dark & Light" - 2 Brothers of oppisite sides joining forces!

details.title: ShadowLight Siblings
details.description:
Two brothers against a world deprived of its colors.

Each brother exists in his own dimension:
In the White dimension Witi can see and interact with Dark objectsIn the Dark dimension Blicki can see and interact with Light objects
This game was created for the 1-Bit gameJam:
Only using 2 colors at any given timeMain theme - Light and Dark7 days time limitPost processing and different Shaders were allowed as long as you keep the two color rule intact
Jam link - https://itch.io/jam/1-bit-jam-wow




How-To-Play

Movement
Move Left and Right with A-DHold Space for a long JumpTap Space for a low JumpPress left Mouse button to AttackWiti can use a swordBlicki has a gun!Click TAB to switch between dimensions (players)Use levers and uncover additional secrets throughout the levels

General Level hotkeys
"R" to Restart the level"ESC" to go back to the Main Menu

Future plans / Things that were cut out due to lack of time / open issues
The ladders - no animation or sound when climbing a ladder.  the ladders will be overhauled in the next big patch.Easy / Hard mode
Add way more levelsThe ending which is a secret and supposed to be very fun to read was supposed to be way more generic and never ending (but currently it will end the game :) )

game.title: Space Station OS - Game Jam Edition
game.short_text: The world's first space fuel station simulator

details.title: Space Station OS - Game Jam Edition
details.description:
Employee,
   Welcome to the Space Station OS family!
   You're now the proud administrator of a Space Station OS fuel station and it's your job to keep this family running smoothly by maintaining profitability, at all times. 
   How? why of course by harvesting Antimatter, then refine it into Fuel, sell the Fuel, and reinvest the profits. 
   Grow your numbers, increase your value, drive more sales. Make us proud!
Sincerely, Management
P.S. whatever you do, don't let your fuel run out or forget your taxes

Corporate Credits & Sponsors: 
Reeves Smoak (Music & Code)
Jack Honeycutt (Code)
Supporting Art Assets
1-Bit Game Jam 2023
Made for the 1-Bit Game Jam 2023

Corporate Feedback Program:
If you enjoyed the game, please leave us a quick comment with what you enjoyed most and what you had the most trouble with so we can continue to improve the game. 
Also, follow Franz Kafka's Office Printer for more game jam titles and updates on expansions to existing games. Thank you for playing!

details.title: Eternal Eclipse
details.description:
There seems to be a permeating Mist of Misery that flows through the Swamp of Sorrows as disease and decay flood the land.
No one truly knows the origin of this wretched curse, for those who attempt to enter... have never been seen again by their loved ones: dead or alive.
Will your fate end up the same...?
~ WHO DID~

~ CONTROLS ~ 
Use your mouse to aim at the monsters.
Press ESC to pause and resume the game if needed

· Great Retro Music

game.title: Proliferate
game.short_text: Short narrative game made for the 1-BIT Game Jam (2023)

details.title: Proliferate
details.description:
Step into the shoes of Charles, next in line to take the role of Doctor, just as his father and Grandfather held before him.
 That was the plan until he left his small town to pursue Art in the City, only returning now after the death of his Father. Charles soon finds out however, the death of his father and his inheritance are the least of his concerns, as he is the only one standing between the town and Proliferation…
---------------------------
Short narrative game made for the 1BIT Game Jam (2023)
Game was made in GameMaker Studio 2 with a custom built dialogue engine and shader engine. Featuring 4 days, 3 nights, almost 1000 lines of dialogue, and a wide variety of paths to follow with multiple different endings.
---------------------------
Credits
Michael Tweedale - Programming, Game Concept
Peyton Denisar - Story Writing, Character Concepts, Game Concept
Jessica Matthews - Story Writing, Character Concepts, Game Concept
Joshua Peddicord - Story Concept, Writing Editor
Lucas Ferrell Mendoza (Kvntus on Facebook)- Character Art/Design & Sprites
Justin Morvant (Checkjtm on Discord)  - Background Art & World Assets
Kaelen Sheppard (K_Shepp69 on Twitter)- Original Soundtrack
Bret Gurganus - Credit Impressionist
Noel Sadak - Crew Coordinator

game.title: Caliginosity
game.short_text: Stay in  the light, avoid the  darkness, and escape! A short game made for the 1-Bit Jam

details.title: Caliginosity
details.description:
Made for the 1-Bit Jam. Limitation -  2 colors. Theme - Light & Dark.
Controls:
WASD/Left Joystick/D-pad - Move around
E/Joystick "A" (or equivalent) - Confirm/Interact
Q/Joystick "B"(or equivalent) - Cancel/Drop Item
note for controls: in case of non QWERTY keyboards, the keys should  be the equivalent on the physical place of the QWERTY layout. 

---------------------------------------------------------------
Noun:
caliginosity (countable and uncountable, plural caliginosities)  

darkness; obscurity.

---------------------------------------------------------------

A  short game developed for the 1-Bit Game Jam.
Escape this ominous building before the malevolent force lurking within claims you as its own.
 As you travel through the eerie corridors, remember that light is your ally. Stay within its reach to thwart the sinister presence that hunts you. But beware, for the darkness is not to be underestimated – an ancient evil lies concealed within its depths, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.
Will you muster the courage to overcome your fear, evade the lurking evil, and find your way out, or will the shadows claim yet another lost soul?Made with Godot 4.1.1

notes:
Web build unavailable due to lack of shadows, necessary for the game mechanics, when exporting for web with Godot 4Extract and run "Caliginosity_Win64.exe"

moreInfo.Author: Dogveloper
moreInfo.Tags: 1-bit, 3D, Atmospheric, Creepy, Dark, Godot, Horror, Indie, Short, Top-Down

game.short_text: Show who's true king in this enlightening experience
game.title: Card Knight

details.title: Card Knight
details.description:
Card Knight
Our fellow knight, Cornelius Darc is brought to an ancient spell upon messing with different geometric forms. Now he finally sees who is he's one true king, the All Mighty MK(mad king).  

Will Cornelius give in and spread the deceptive wisdom of the geometric shapes? Can they make you remember what never existed?

In this adventure Cornelius you try and break free from all those spells. Changing his view from the world quite literally from Darc to Light.

Guide, how to play
Play with Cornelius by clicking on the rectangle (the cardy thing). When it flips, find another pair to match. Profit.
After the tutorial, you will be presented with the first 1v1 encounter. The rules are simple:
 if both end up with same amount of cards its a draw;A draw is a lose if you're playing on hard mode;The draw is a win if you're playing regular campaign.if you end up with more cards you win;if he ends up with more cards you lose.
If a stage is too boring, feel free to  IGNORE ALL COFFE PUT IN, PAIN AND STRAIN FOR  SEEING IN TWO COLORS  A WHOLE WEEK  kindly press  ⓢ to skip a stage.
Stick around
If you enjoyed content seen so far, check our other content outlet.

On Threads, if you're into that... Or I'll see you on YouTube, for more Devlogs.

moreInfo.Author: kags
moreInfo.Tags: 1bit, 2D, Local multiplayer, Medieval, Pixel Art

game.title: Voices of Dark and Light
game.short_text: Explore the pocket universe, can you find what you're seeking?

details.title: Voices of Dark and Light
details.description:
[NOTE: Due to poor canvas scaling implementation, the game must be played with a resolution of 1920x1080 in full-screen mode to work properly. I apologize for the inconvenience!]
Hey, this is me first game jam! I played "Lonely Woods" and was inspired to try to make something of my own. I've been attempting to make games on my own for a long time, but never finished anything.
Please let me know if you experience any bugs or issues that prevent you from playing the game. I'm still learning how to program, and the code in here is a bit of a mess!
There is only one ending, as I joined the jam late, and ended up running out of time. I hope that you can get an idea of what I was going for though and still are able to have fun!
---Controls---
[WASD or Arrow keys] to Move.
[Space or Z] to Interact.
[E] to Activate Item.

details.title: Across the RIFT 🌓👽

LOST IN THE RIFT!
Can you find your way through the maze of this space station?
You're Maintenance Officer Blake Evans, and you've been dispatched to the interdimensional forces and threats research space station, the RIFT. But something's wrong, no one's there to greet you and the station seems empty. Well, not quite. Fortunately, you can count on your trusty AI to help you on your adventure.
Find your equipment and jump across the RIFT!


On desktop, the game is best played using your mouse and your keyboard or your favorite controller.It doesn't work on mobile, sorry.

game.title: Dark Flames
game.short_text: A diorama game into the dark

details.title: Dark Flames
details.description:
We made this little game for the 1 Bit Jam 2023.
Darkness has conquered every place, devouring things, people, and memories. The town of Ember is the last outpost that resists the advance of the shadows. You are the ruler of the town, or at least of what's left.
Day after day, the places outside your kingdom's walls disappear, becoming thick darkness. There is no more time: if you don't act quickly, everything will be lost. To stop the darkness, you must ignite the Primordial Flame, an ancient power that once sustained the heat and light of the world itself.
But the Primordial Flame is now extinguished, and its Cinders are found in the Forest of Sorrow, a place from which no one has ever returned.

----------
Credits:
Code and Dark Magic: Giulia FanzaghiDesign and Other Stuff: Matteo SciutteriExecutive producers: Cooper the tiny cat & Mulder the chonky cat


We used some assets - here the special thanks:
Rpg PixelBatuhan KaragölChaser GamingUltimate_EndVrtxrryfrankqbeFrancisco Beltrán

details.title: Lumina Lockdown
details.description:
<[ Due to technical reasons, only the beginning of the game is available in the Web version ]>

This is a small adventure game that will immerse you in the forgotten catacombs of a once majestic castle.
----

Story
You are an engineer and alchemist who spent 3 years inventing a device to penetrate the Castle of Darkness and put an end to the "dark emissions" – that's what people have called the phenomenon driving them insane, emanating from the castle. But as soon as you approached, something dark pulled you inside the castle... Now your main objective is to escape. Choose between light and darkness to solve all the castle's puzzles.

Controls 
WASD\SPACE - move 

Q - switch the lense

 E - attract small objects  
Left click - Pick up / Release the object.

game.short_text: A very minimalistic 1-BIT fighting game
game.title: 敵: Light & Darkness [1-BIT JAM]

details.title: 敵: Light & Darkness [1-BIT JAM]
details.description:
After several years living as a warrior Teki, discovers that his biggest enemy is the darkness inside his own heart. And now he has to face it...

· Press Z to block. Limited to 3 blocks unless you succesfully block an attack.· Press X to attack.· Double tap Z to evade/move back.· Press Z while running to cancel your attack. Use it to waste your enemy's blocks.


A very minimalistic fighting game developed in 6 days for MYline media 👤's 1-BIT JAM. I love fighting games a lot, but sometimes I feel they can get overcomplicated as time goes by, so I started wondering how much you could simplify one, while still making it interesting and fun to play.This JAM gave me the opportunity to create something out from that idea, and also the opportunity to work with 1-BIT pixel art for the first time, something I enjoyed a lot.
While I'm very proud of the results, there is, sadly, a lot of ideas that couldn't make it in time, some of them that were left out completely or partially from the game:
· Soundtrack: Music is not my strong point so I skipped it to save time· In game tutorial: Unfinished, would teach you the basics of the game.· Counters: To give you more reasons to block instead of evading enemy attacks.· Local Multiplayer Mode: Finished but very buggy, so I kept it hidden. You can access it by pressing 2 at the Title Screen. Player 2 is controlled through the arrow keys.
Any feedback, suggestions, bug reports, or anything you wanna share is welcomed!I may go back to this project someday and make something bigger out of it, if enough people seem interested on it.

game.short_text: Made for the 1-BIT Game Jam
game.title: Ember Shadows

details.title: Ember Shadows
details.description:
Ember Shadows was made by National Film and Television School students and alumni for the 1-BIT JAM 2023 game jam. The theme was "Light & Dark".
Description: Ember Shadows is a suspenseful puzzle game where you play a firefighter stuck in a nightmare. You need to extinguish fires under limited time and avoid large holes or fall deeper into the nightmare. Unfortunately, the fires that you’re extinguishing are also your only source of light…
Controls: Playable with mouse & keyboard (WASD & arrow keys), hold left click to use extinguisher.How to Play: Time's ticking… extinguish all fires in the level to proceed. Be careful not to fall into any holes or get too close to the fire.
Credits: Project Lead (Wrangler) by Ilena Yeru PeganConcept by Wen “Daniel” JinArt Direction, Level Design & Unity Integration by Annabelle Afful & Wen “Daniel” Jin User Interface (UI) by Yi Xin “Chester” Huang and Wen “Daniel” Jin Programmed by Yi Xin “Chester” Huang and Ilena Yeru Pegan Music by Harpal MudharFire Particle Consultation by Linus Chilvers
Story narrative and comment on game design: A firefighter finds herself trapped in a haunting nightmare, battling against the infernos of anxiety and overthinking that plague her mind. However, with each failure, she descends deeper into the abyss, symbolizing her succumbing to the relentless cycle of rumination and distress. Gradually, extinguishing the fires at each level grants her a sense of tranquillity, allowing her mind to finally find solace, eventually guiding her back into a peaceful slumber.
The puzzle-oriented level design enables players to strategically manoeuvre through the environment by extinguishing fires and deftly avoiding pitfalls and obstacles present in the darkness. 
Third Party Assets:'POLYGON Office - Low Poly 3D Art' by Synty Studios'POLYGON Town Pack - Low Poly 3D Art' by Synty Studios'Destroyed Building Kit' by Loknar Studio'Low Poly Animated People' by polyperfect'POLYGON Particle FX - Low Poly 3D Art' by Synty Studios'Quick Outline' by Chris Nolet'FREE Casual Game SFX Pack' by Dustyroom
Sound FX:Greg_Surr - Creaking in Room 12.wavMiekyj - creaking floor OWI.wavConnorM94 Creaking_Floor_Low_Tone.wavIamgiorgio - Fire HoseWilliam020304 - Moving FurnitureMATRIXXX_ - Moving ChairVincePest11 - Car RunningReitanna - Female GaspTranzfusion - ExtinguisherIamgiorgio - ExtinguisherFoleyhaven - Fire_Burning_03.flacjamesmbock - babywhine1.mp3xUMR - fridge.loop.oggAunrea - Dog whimperingInspectorJ - Car alarmtrullilulli - SFX Ambiance: Electrical Hum
Icons:Fire icons created by Good Ware - Flaticon

details.title: Pipelurker
details.description:
Sound design, music : Jean Tatsi(https://nebula-audio.itch.io/)

Programing, art : Elie Vigouroux(https://evigouroux.itch.io/)
Pipelurkers are a strange species, though they looks like humans they disintegrate in contact with light. As such, they are treated as second class citizens and forced to live underground.
Play as one of them in an effort to reclaim your lost relic from the fetid hands of the surfacers who stole it.
__________________
Inspired by Abe's odyssey, Prince of persia and other classic of the genre, Pipelurker is a stealth platforming game where a prolonged contact with light will kill your character. Thread carefully, avoid direct confrontation and reclaim your treasure.
Made in 5 days for the first 1 Bit Jam.

game.title: RoastMaster
game.short_text: A fast paced and addictive immersive coffee-mixing simulator.

details.title: RoastMaster
details.description:
Ever wanted to be a top notch #1 barista worker? Play RoastMaster™ to achieve the highest score without messing up an order!  

CONTROLS
Arrow keys - navigation
"X" / "A" on controller/keyboard - select
On Gameover, press "z" or "b" on controller to reset the game
"Esc" /  "Start" - pause game / reset / options
Use the arrow keys or grab the DPad of your controller to navigate the beautiful tactile interface our engineers here at RoastMaster™ Industries have created . Press "x" to make a selection or "a" if you fancy a controller. 
GAMEPLAY
To serve your customers, start by turning the machine on. 
You have to put the coffee somewhere, so add a cup.  If you don't want what you've made, you can always get rid of it with the reset button.  

Each customer who enters the RoastMaster™ Cafe™ will order one of 6 shades of coffee. The scale starts at Milk. At the bottom, we have Dark Roast and Light Roast. The other shades can be made by mixing these three ingredients together; experiment! 
Be sure to watch the fill line to the left of the cup; too little coffee and your customers will leave unhappy, and too much can cause a mess.
If you want to add a little extra liquid without changing shades, the ice dispenser is here for you! Just drop off few of them in, free of charge, and watch the customer's eyes light up with delight. Or don't, I don't care. 
You'll also notice that you're on a strict timer. That's how we do it here at RoastMaster™. Take too long to serve the customer, and they leave. You'll lose a life, of which you only have 3. Be careful. We do not provide health insurance. 
Be sure to slap that ENJOY button at the end to send that drink to the customer in time.

SCORING
Fulfilling a correct order will result in +1 point, multiplied by any active multiplier.
Multipliers are gained by continuing successive combos of orders. Go for the high score! Or honestly chill out and play slow and listen to the soundtrack. 

----
This is an entry in the 2023 1-Bit Game Jam
by @iquill 
sound music @lydon_music

game.title: "La Obscura"
game.short_text: "God does not own the sea."

details.title: "La Obscura"
details.description:
"At sea you learn to fear the dark, learn to pray to whatever god you've got for a spot, a dash of light. I don't know how often they hear us, but I do know that they've got a funny way of answering."Tasked with delivering a restricted package to an island off the Coast of Cubana, Raul Sol Blanco sets off onto the raging seas to earn his keep. Navigate the open sea alone on your vessel "La Obscura" while avoiding cragged rocks and whatever else the sea throws at you.
Keep a keen eye however, as if a storm were to hit, your vision may betray you and leave you with only lightning to guide your path."The sea is cruel, but the sky gifts light to us lowly sailors."
Controls:Steer Left:        A  /  Left ArrowSteer Right:     D  /  Right ArrowRecommendations:- Play in a dark room with few distractions.- Wear Stereo Headphones (audio cues)
Playtime: ~20 minutes

game.title: Ship in a Black Ship
game.short_text: A short-ish horror game about exploring the depths of the ocean.

details.title: Ship in a Black Ship
details.description:
A 1-bit horror game where you must find and scan a signal somewhere deep underwater, and bring it back without getting killed by the shadows down below... or your own clumsiness.
Horror isn't really my thing, so this was an interesting project for me. I think the game-play could best be described as a fusion of Five Nights at Freddy's and Iron Lung.
The web-version runs surprisingly well, but the executable's are still a better experience - the HTML5 has some graphical and audio bugs.
Made for the 2023 1-Bit Game Jam hosted by MYline media.

WARNING: This game contains jumpscares and loud noises. There are also mild flashing lights.
Keybindings -
    Esc - exit game / reset game data
    F / F5 / F11 - toggle fullscreen

Samples used (all from Freesound.org) - 

"Creaking attic door." by jymdavis, ID: 210105
"Buzzing, Electric Lamp, A" by InspectorJ (www.jshaw.co.uk), ID: 415873

"camera with flash.wav" by skynproduction, ID: 91480
"Camera Flash Charging.aif" by ftpalad, ID: 119902
"camera flash charge.wav" by adeluc4, ID: 125326
"Rusty Metal Creaking" by unfa, ID: 207993
"Click" by abstraktgeneriert, ID: 217482
"Plugging In Guitar" by yfjesse, ID: 240132
"Glass Smash.wav" by chewiesmissus, ID: 244238
"Guitar and amp.wav" by FrankyBoomer, ID: 251274
"Camera shutter and flash combined" by montclairguy, ID: 353044
"Finger Snaps" by JohnsonBrandEditing, ID: 369549
"Full radio sweep.wav" by vedas, ID: 396902
"Old camera flash.wav" by MichelleGrobler, ID: 410559
"Click 06.wav" by gusgus26, ID: 415094
"Fuze Switch Flick" by LordForklift, ID: 448394
"water spray in plastic bucket fill from hose with nozzle.wav" by kyles, ID: 452663
"Orange Guitar Amp Noise" by Sassaby, ID: 517183
"Gun Hammer Click" by magnuswaker, ID: 523087
"Fan 2.mp3" by denstoltejyde, ID: 553746
"Foley_Object_Metal_Oven_Creaks_Mono.wav" by Nox_Sound, ID: 585734
"Scrap metal dropping / crashing" by SamsterBirdies, ID: 587443
"Car Crash (with Glass)", by magnuswaker, ID: 592388
"amp_feedback_7.wav" by strangehorizon, ID: 622128
"Vlissingen Coast Area Marine Radio NL 220221.ogg" by klankbeeld, ID: 626963
"CLICK - plastic bottle lid - SNAP.wav" by Duisterwho, ID: 644049
"Scary Machine Startup.wav" by TraceyRegina, ID: 647225
"Camera Flash Sound.wav" by juanstrydom2002, ID: 655045

Each one of these samples was put through some sort of processing.


Oh, and by the way, try and finish each expedition with as much power remaining as you can. Who knows? Maybe something special will happen if you play well enough...

INSTRUCTIONS (for those who couldn't understand the in-game tutorial)
A lot of people were confused as to how to play the game. So here's a little guide I've whipped up. It's a hacky solution for a complex problem, but it's better than nothing.
Click and hold the buttons on either side of the radar screen to move the ship. You should see the arrow on the radar screen rotate as you turn the ship. The button above the one on the right moves the ship forward.
Click the white button by the porthole to toggle the lights. General rule of thumb: if you see white pixels through the window, there's a wall straight ahead. Be careful!
Click and hold the pulley (hanging lever), then drag down to initiate flash. It'll immediately dissipate every nearby living shadow and keep them away for a good while. It'll also use a lot of power.

Every once in a while, the radar will ping, finding the objective and showing the direction on the screen. If the arrow is pointing towards the porthole (up), the objective is straight ahead. You may have to take a detour if there's a wall in the way.
Once the signal is scanned, the arrow will point towards the drop-off location. Basically, go back the way you came.

Throughout the expedition, shadows may appear around the ship, gradually trying to break in. If you think there's a shadow somewhere on the ship, turn on the light and turn the ship around until you find it. But be careful - lights use up power, and turning the ship takes a long time.
Hitting a wall will damage the ship. A screen all the way to the right will alert you if the ship is damaged. If you hit too many walls, the power will cut out and the ship will eventually shatter. Basically, don't hit walls. Walls bad.

You will traverse through various biomes and locations and encounter formidable foes on your way to rescue our beloved and precious neighbour's Dog from the hands of the darkness.

game.title: Flee, Fair Light!
game.short_text: Hunt down the Light in this 1-bit labyrinthine arcade-style game!

details.title: Flee, Fair Light!
details.description:
CONTROLS
ATTACK AND CAPTURE THE LIGHT, LEST IT FLEE FROM YOUR CLAWS! WASD/Arrows - Move through the mazeE - Attack and capture the Light (from 2 m or less away)P - Restart level and try again / Skip intro cutscene
"You have unleashed a terrible beast of Darkness upon us! Flee, fair Light!"
The Light has awoken a terrible Darkness... Play as a monster with a bloodlust for brilliance and catch the Light in this 1-bit arcade style game!

The Light will attempt to flee from you through a labyrinthine set of winding paths and use every tool at its disposal to flee from you, slyly stopping you in your tracks as it too navigates this strange maze it now finds itself in. Capture the Light in your deadly claws, lest it escape from you!
Originally conceived as a game idea for GMTK Game Jam 2023 Roles Reversed, "Flee, Fair Light!" was created in one week for the Light & Dark themed "1-BIT JAM".
SOUNDTRACK
Listen to the music for "Flee, Fair Light!" on YouTube, Bandcamp, and many more platforms!

details.title: Escape From The Lab
details.description:
Instructions: You are RoboX, a friendly robot who was captured by an evil scientist and locked up in his secret lab. Your mission is to escape from the lab and find your way back to your home planet. But be careful! The lab is guarded by fierce robot dogs who will catch you if they see you. The dogs can also spot you through the windows that surround the lab. To avoid them, you need to move stealthily and hide behind various objects in the lab. You also need to dodge the searchlight that sweeps across the lab every few seconds. It may take a few tries to break through the thick metal wall of the lab using your laser beam. Use the ‘left’ and ‘right’ arrows to move RoboX from its jail cell on the right towards the wall on the left and out of the lab. Can you help RoboX escape from the lab and return to its home planet? Good luck! 
Escape From The Lab is based on the 1982 handheld game, "Search Light", by Gakken.Credits: Captain Goodnight: Programming, ArtA.U.Freeman: Sound/Music, Art

My submission for the 1-BIT JAM 2023 I interpreted the theme "Light and Dark" with the concept of the shadow theater, where paper or cardboard cutouts are used as actors in the scene.Sit down at the theater and play an interactive story, Made for every age, there's no skill required to enjoy this short game. game.title: Vocabius
game.short_text: Defend your wizard's tower with WORDS. Do you even SPELL?

details.title: Vocabius
details.description:
Made for the 1-BIT Jam within one week (with about 3 days of focused work).You're the word wizard Vocabius. Defend your tower by SPELLing words to shine a light on the army of darkness!
Your enemies will yield to your spell depending on what type they are:
- Little Demon (X): Eliminated if your word has "X" in it.
- Squiggly Squirmer (X__  / __X): Eliminated if your word starts or ends with "X".
- Stink Fly (Number N): Eliminated if your word is of the length "N"
IMPORTANT: For every letter in your word, the enemies will take a step forward. Longer words are powerful, but use them wisely!

moreInfo.Author: gastricsparrow
moreInfo.Tags: Tower Defense, Word game

details.title: CatriOS (Game)
details.description:
-- Українська --

- Передісторія -
На дворі 2009 рік, ви спокійно сидите за своїм ПК, і тут вам хтось стукає у двері. Ви відкриваєте їх, і нікого не бачите. Натомість ви бачите диск завернутий у типовий паперовий конверт. Ви вирішуєте подивитись що це за диск. На ньому написано CatriOS, і текст "Встанови та прочитай README файл". 


- Геймплей -
Що ж. Вам дали невідому операційну систему. Вам дають можливість потицяти її, та подивитись, на що вона здатна. Але в якийсь момент, система починає ввести себе дивно. Відчуття що з вами, хтось розмовляє.

- Інфо -
Зроблено на: Pygame
Звуки: JSFXR, власноруч, старі проєкти
Графіка: Aseprite та код)
==========================

-- English --

- Background -
It's 2009, you're sitting quietly at your computer, and then someone knocks on your door. You open it, but you don't see anyone. Instead, you see a disk wrapped in a typical paper envelope. You decide to see what kind of disk it is. It says CatriOS and the text "Install and read the README file".


- Gameplay -
Well. You are given an unknown operating system. You are given the opportunity to poke around and see what it can do. But at some point, the system starts to behave strangely. You feel like someone is talking to you.

- Info -
Made on: Pygame
Sounds: JSFXR, my own, old projects
Graphics: Aseprite and code)

==========================

-- Other --
Source-Code: https://gitlab.com/TitleChanQWERTY/reversoperation
Special For: Ігровари літній джем 2023/Ihrovary GameJam 2023
WARNING: Linux version requires glibc version 2.38

game.title: Reporter
game.short_text: Can you reading signals and writing reports with problems in electricity in that time?

details.title: Reporter
details.description:
Hi! This game was made for a 1-Bit Jam!

Here you need to take signals from your radio and make Reports about them, but in the current time your electricity turned off . 
HOW TO PLAY
In the first, instruction screen of the game you can see instructions, UI and arrow.
Instructions: This is a guide to decrypt messages, be sure to read it carefully because without it you can't decrypt messages and fix your electricity
UI: On UI you can see Clock with sun that shows In game time and Sun changes to moon after 19:00
Line indicator that shows wires are broken or not. Wrong report counter, have 3 cells they can become ! cell if you made a wrong report.
Arrow: This buttons allow you to changing screens of the game
If you click on Arrow button you will see a Main screen, here you have lots of activities.
Buttons: They are signed "Black" and "White", if you press it Black(if black button) or White(if white button) pixel will appear on the current row.
Lever: Lever turns down the row of pixels, can used only once until screen is not cleared.
Radio: This strange mechanism with two antennas, when call(about it later) happens signals spawns above it.
If you press the right arrow button on this screen you will see the Report screen.
Signal box: If you press on underline you will see 4 buttons (! button means SOS, Gate button means Open Gate, √ button means Expedition End, Cross Gate button means Close gate after it Position/Number box appears.
Position/Number box: If you press it you can write every symbol in it, but you really need only numbers and dot... Don't really try wri...
If you press left arrow button on Main screen you will see Electricity room
Wires: In the normal state you can't really do smth with them but when they broken you need to click them alternatively by the pattern in the Instructions room
If you click down button in Main screen you will see Door.
Door: Cannot be open...
If you click right button In Report screen you will see Window.
Window: You can open it but it will close after some time. Doing nothing but smb can thr...
Camera: Just watching, too high to rot...
If you press left button in Electricity screen you can see Broken lev...
Broken mechanism: Just exist don't try to fi...
In game you can see some mechanics
Call: At a random minute you will have a call button. If you press it random pattern of signals will appear above the radio. To decrypt it you need to use the rules in the Instructions screen.
Reporting: After it you need to report it in Report screen to do it you need to use Signal box and Position/Number box, how to use them written in the Instructions screen.
Letters: To pickup them you need to press on i... Don't try to do things that written on i...
That's all to win you need to work until 00:00 or open the do... ! 
In the game exist fi... four endings try two collect them all! Oh and to skip some time you can open a Arcanoid like Mini game by pressing Q, to control platform in it you need to press A-D. Good luck!

game.title: Ink
game.short_text: Puzzle horror game created for the MYline media 1-bit jam!

details.title: Ink
details.description:
Explore a strange world, where sight is only possible through the spreading of ink. Solve puzzles, and evade danger as you seek to escape the unknown.
- My first ever published game!
Controls:
WASD for movement. This will spread ink on every step that allows you to see the surroundings.


Hold SHIFT to sprint, and spread ink farther.
Hold CTRL to sneak, and spread less ink.
LEFT CLICK to stomp, spreading ink the farthest and resetting all other ink (must be stationary to stomp).A word of advice:Just as the spreading of ink can ring a bell, it may also strike the attention of something undesirable.

game.title: Piano Light
game.short_text: A game about lighting lightbulbs as a piano. Made for 1-BIT JAM

details.title: Piano Light
details.description:
Made for 1-BIT JAM. 
You play as a piano with a lightbulb on it. That lights up lightbulbs by preforming Infront of them. 
CREDITS:
Game Engine: Unity
Music Created with: LMMS
Animations Created with: Aseprite
there is an in-game tutorial but if you need more help then continue reading.



LIGHTBULBS:
different light bulbs like different performances here are the different performances:
Copy lightbulb: Do exactly what the lightbulb does once it's your turn. 
Remix lightbulb: Do more than what the lightbulb does once it's your turn. For example, if it does {UP UP DOWN RIGHT} then you do {UP UP UP RIGHT DOWN DOWN}.
Demix lightbulb: Do less than what the lightbulb does once it's your turn. For example, if it does {UP UP UP DOWN RIGHT} then you do {UP DOWN RIGHT}.
THREATS:
  Hornage: Just a basic enemy use your note attack (Space) to take it down.
 Flutesear: It works the same way as the Hornage except it has ranged attacks instead of melee attacks.
 Killbord: This one work differently than the other two, it cannot be killed with your note attack (it gets stunned instead), And only one can be on the map at a time.  You need to defeat it in a Piano Battle to take it down. A Piano battle works just like pia lightbulb performance does except it last multiple turns. and the type of performance will change with each turn. If you do good, then all of the enemies on the map will die and The Killbord wont spawn until a little while. But do bad, then you will lose 50% of your HP. But the Killbord will despawn.


TIPS AND TRICKS:
You can press Q to stop preforming.  
You can press Esc to quit to title
The Play time counter on the title screen counts time in just seconds and not minutes. 
Enemies wont attack if you're in a piano battle.
Enemies wont attack if you're in range of a light.
You will slowly regain HP if you are in range of a light.
The Killbord will not move if you are preforming to a lightbulb.


For download unzip the file then click on the game EXE file.

moreInfo.Author: NoteBoxz
moreInfo.Tags: 1-bit-jam, 2D, Black and White, lightbulb, Music, piano, Short, Singleplayer, Unity

game.title: tawa suno mute
game.short_text: Explore the stories a forgotten people left behind

details.title: tawa suno mute
details.description:
This is not a fast-paced game. You are strongly recommended to play with a notebook.
Experiment. Backtrack. Not all paths lead immediately to success.
There were people here, long ago. They were forgotten, and now they are no more. But they have left a series of puzzles, and it seems that they wanted to be understood. And so that is your goal: to understand.
--------------------------
Made in a few days for the 2023 1-BIT JAM.
All graphical assets and code were produced during the jam.
The language in the game is a slightly-modified version of Sonja Lang's toki pona (n.b. the game is intended to be played by someone who has not seen toki pona before, and doesn't look up words outside of the game. If I'd spent more time on this I would have made a language rather than borrowed one)
--------------------------
Music
Lightless Dawn by Kevin MacLeod | https://incompetech.com/Music promoted by https://www.chosic.com/free-music/all/Creative Commons CC BY 3.0https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/
